message:
feat(cli): add sigstore bundle verification and expand install/update commands

Expand the CLI subsystem with sigstore offline bundle verification
support and richer install/update command options.

- cli/mod.rs: Add sigstore_policy_and_probe_for_bundle() for offline
  cosign verify-blob integration, with probe_sigstore_bundle() helper
  and command_output_details() formatter; add corresponding tests
- cli/install.rs: Expand installer with 85+ lines of new installation
  path handling and verification hooks
- cli/update.rs: Expand updater with 89+ lines of new update workflow
  steps and rollback safety checks
- cli_app.rs: Refactor CLI argument parsing and subcommand routing
  (131 lines changed) for cleaner dispatch
- cli/assets.rs, bootstrap.rs, uninstall.rs: Formatting and minor
  signature alignment changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
